message:
feat(github,jira,zendesk,m365): add secretless CredentialId auth and doctor/self_check diagnostics

Implement CredentialId-based egress-proxy auth as an alternative to
direct tokens across four connectors:

- GitHub: GitHubAuth enum (Token / CredentialId), xor validation,
  doctor (6 checks), self_check with SelfCheckReport
- Jira: JiraAuth enum (Token{domain,email,api_token} / CredentialId),
  3-way xor validation, doctor, self_check
- Zendesk: ZendeskAuth enum (Token{subdomain,email,api_token} /
  CredentialId), DEFAULT_BASE_URL_TEMPLATE, doctor, self_check
- Microsoft365: handle_doctor() with config/client/base_url/auth_mode/
  connectivity checks

All include redacted_label(), is_secretless() helpers, structured
DoctorResult/DoctorCheck responses, and main.rs message routing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -97,6 +97,8 @@ async fn handle_message(connector: &mut GitHubConnector, message: &str) -> serde
         "configure" => connector.handle_configure(params).await,
         "handshake" => connector.handle_handshake(params).await,
         "health" => connector.handle_health().await,
+        "doctor" => connector.handle_doctor().await,
+        "self_check" => connector.handle_self_check().await,
         "introspect" => connector.handle_introspect().await,
         "invoke" => connector.handle_invoke(params).await,
         "simulate" => connector.handle_simulate(params).await,
